title: Il sole negli occhi
writer: Antonio Pietrangeli, Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Lucio Battistrada
actors: Gabriele Ferzetti, Irene Galter, Pina Bottin
plot: A young and shy girl Celestina arrives from her small home village to Rome to become a housemaid. Her inexperience and naivety causes her to change her employers quite frequently. As she is moving from one family to another she ma...
